Password must contain at least one upper: Tus password yuav tsum muaj tsawg kawg ib tsab ntawv loj!
● At least 1 Lowercase Letter: ● Tsawg kawg yog 1 Tsab Ntawv Me
Password must be 8-16 characters!: Tus password yuav tsum yog 8-16 cim!
● Passwords must match: ● Cov passwords yuav tsum sib phim
Password must contain at least one symbo: Password yuav tsum muaj tsawg kawg yog ib lub cim!
● Username Length Must Be Between 3-16: ● Lub Sij Hawm Lub Sij Hawm yuav tsum nyob nruab nrab ntawm 3-16
● Password Length Must Be Between 8-16: ● Tus password ntev yuav tsum nyob nruab nrab ntawm 8-16
Password must contain at least one lower: Tus password yuav tsum muaj tsawg kawg ib tsab ntawv me!
● At least 1 Uppercase Letter: ● Yam tsawg kawg yog 1 Tsab Ntawv Loj
Password must contain at least one numbe: Tus password yuav tsum muaj tsawg kawg ib tus lej!
